{{Infobox location
| name = Iteration One-one-zero
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Iteration One-one-zero]] is the location [[Suriel]] has arrived in.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6">''Unsouled'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Suriel]] requests clearance for unbound transportation within [[Iteration One-one-zero]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Iteration One-one-zero]] has deviated from its primary course.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Iteration One-one-zero]] is a location in empty space.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Otherworldly locations]]
